title: euphrasia collina var. speciosa
intro: Euphrasia collina var. speciosa, also known as Eyebright, is a perennial plant native to mountainous regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating eye and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Eyebright include reducing inflammation, soothing sore eyes, and alleviating symptoms of colds, coughs, and sinus infections. Eyebright is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
